summary_one_line: Input must contain a pHYs chunk (FOURCC 'pHYs' = 70 48 59 73) so png_handle_pHYs is dispatched and the length!=9 test is reached.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A chunk whose 4-byte type field equals the ASCII literal 'pHYs' (70 48 59 73). The PNG chunk-type dispatcher only calls png_handle_pHYs when the chunk type matches 'pHYs'; without that exact FOURCC the code at pngrutil.c:2180 (if (length != 9)) is never reached, let alone resolved.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seed 2 (vpc, trial 1) carries the literal bytes 70 48 59 73 ('pHYs') at offset 0x25-0x28, so the dispatcher invokes png_handle_pHYs and the branch is exercised 103 times; W reaches line 2180 with T=15/F=6.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Every loser-blocking seed has 67 41 4d 41 ('gAMA') at offset 0x25-0x28 and no pHYs FOURCC, so png_handle_pHYs is never dispatched; L records T=0 F=13 at line 2180 (the branch is never reached) and the loser blocks 9/10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile: the chunk-type comparison against the 'pHYs' constant is logged in the CmpLogObserver, and I2SRandReplace splices that logged 4-byte constant directly into the input where the (mutated) chunk-type bytes sit, manufacturing a valid 'pHYs' FOURCC in seconds. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and must blunder the exact 4-byte token by chance, which it fails to do.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the length test inside png_handle_pHYs and the globally-blocked side is the true branch.
A winner-resolving seed carries the literal 'pHYs' FOURCC at offset 0x25.
Loser-blocking seeds carry 'gAMA' rather than 'pHYs' at the same chunk-type offset.
The winner reaches and exercises line 2180 while the loser never reaches it.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L2180  T=15 F=6  T=0 F=13  if (length != 9)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The branch dispatch into png_handle_pHYs is gated on the chunk type and the byte-diff shows winners flipping the chunk-type bytes toward a different FOURCC.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace while value_profile does not, which is the single technique delta of the decisive pair.
The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile with an I2S technique delta and large divergence.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 4020 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 60e9d782d27cdf4b` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -, ParentInfo-only) at depth 4 of the ancestor chain, the floor signal for an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where the pHYs chunk-type comparison is replaced by a runtime-derived (non-input-byte) dispatch key showing value_profile_cmplog losing its advantage over value_profile would refute the I2S-substitution mechanism; conversely, if value_profile resolves the branch at the same rate as vpc once an exact-FOURCC token gate is present, the I2S attribution is wrong.

weakest_evidence_point: Only one of five winner seeds shows the literal 'pHYs' FOURCC (the rest carry 'gAMA'), so the byte evidence that the FOURCC is the resolving feature rather than a co-occurring length/IHDR change rests on a single seed plus the dispatch-gating source logic.
